2344390.name: TetraMage
2344390.description: In TetraMage you step into the sandals of the legendary hero himself, the master of Tetromino magic and unwanted guest in the realm of the gods: the TetraMage. Use your skill and cunning in arranging falling blocks to cast powerful spells and destroy your enemies! Gather experience points and items in battle to customize your character! Success will require adaptability, as each game of TetraMage is randomized and unique, and death is permanent! Failure is fun! Do you have what it takes to snatch the Secret of Immortality from the jealous grasp of the gods and escape in one piece?
2344390.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
